result.stdout:
Description:
  SlnUp 3.2.0.0

Usage:
  SlnUp [<version>] [options]

Arguments:
  <version>  The Visual Studio version to update the solution file with. Can be either a product year (ex. 2017, 2019, 2022, or 2026) or a 2 or 3-part version number (ex. 16.9 or 18.0.0). [default: 2026]

Options:
  -p, --path <path>                The path to the solution file.
  --build-version <build-version>  Uses version information as specified with this build version number.
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information
  --version                        Show version information
